title: Plasticxo Revamp (Chunky)
description: A Revamp made by Akooa of my pack Plasticxo (with Chunky swords)
body:
This Plasticxo Revamp made by Akooa is a 1.8.9 pvp texture pack made for bedwars but usable in other 1.8.9 gamemodes as well.

It features a very "Plastic" themed with thick black borders arround items.

It was release due to my channel reaching 300 subscribers !

It's the Chunky version of the pack, there is also a Skinny swords & a Classic sword variant both available on my account :)

Here are some ingame screenshots :


![Plasticxo Chunky Revamp - 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/416041f8b88a9967967379cfdb69350489fb7d94.jpeg)

![Plasticxo Chunky Revamp - 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/457e11929f3870af66c3299efcc8116b72c1ecc4.jpeg)

![Plasticxo Chunky Revamp - 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a656230b0edcdb93840f98e9c3581329d4441274.jpeg)

![Plasticxo Chunky Revamp - 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbd34ba9a4859989bd7355cda448ec02811f21e4.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
